settings.editor: At Nellie Gail Orthodontics, our outstanding orthodontic team is truly exceptional. Patient-focused, compassionate, and dedicated to your smile journey, they treat you like family. Our team embodies the principles of care, warmth, and excellence that define our practice. We pride ourselves on having a diverse team, including fluent Spanish speakers, enabling us to provide a welcoming experience for patients from various backgrounds. Communication is key, which is why our team is proficient in English, Spanish, and Arabic. We warmly welcome patients of all languages and backgrounds. When you choose Nellie Gail Orthodontics, you’re choosing a team that cares about your unique needs and delivers top-quality orthodontic care.

settings.title: See What Our Patients Have to Say

settings.editor: We love seeing smiles shine! Every visit is designed for comfort, care, and results that make you feel amazing. See why patients can’t stop smiling about Nellie Gail Orthodontics.

slides.content: My daughter had her braces removed and we are so happy with the results! Our experience at this office was amazing! Every appointment was smooth, we never had a long wait time, the Dr was always so nice and friendly and talked with us at every appointment. My daughter enjoyed coming here and she is in love with her new smile! Thank you so much Nellie Gail Orthodontics! We definitely recommend!
slides.name: Wilkinson Memphis

slides.content: I had a great experience throughout my whole braces experience!! The office is clean and comfortable, would recommend to people who need any orthodontic treatments!!! So thankful to Dr. Stephanie and her team for making my braces journey a good one. Happy with my new smile!! :)
slides.name: Hailey Holden (Keona)

settings.editor: As a husband and wife orthodontist team, we understand the value of family. Our approach is built on the principles of trust, warmth, and inclusivity. When you’re with us, you’re treated as part of our family, and your comfort and well-being are our top priority.

icon_list.text: Committed to our community through local events, activities, and fundraisers
Cutting edge technology for convenience and comfort
Indoor and Outdoor games for an enjoyable visit, even while waiting

settings.address: Nellie Gail Orthodontics: Braces and Invisalign
